shows.name: TH3 SC3N3 XD
shows.desc: Talking about and playing the hottest emo and alternative music of today!

shows.name: Dylan's Jams
shows.desc: Join Dylan as he plays and talks about classic songs and B-sides from the 60s, 70s, and beyond with a focus on progressive & classic rock.

shows.name: Camp Night with Bear Dentist
shows.desc: Camp Night is a sunset show, presenting comfy music to ease your afternoons and nights. Fuzzy indie music, ambient electronic, and all other kinds of hopeful music - set up a shortwave radio and watch the sky turn orange.

shows.name: The Princess & The Prog
shows.desc: The Peddler is back! And now in captivity! Watch him be psychoanalyzed every week as the Peddler and Doc listen to prog, 70s rock, and more!
shows.hosts: The Prog Peddler and DJ Seal
